references.text: Lehnert, M & FP Coritico. 2018. The genus Dicksonia (Dicksoniaceae - Cyatheales) in western Malesia. Blumea 63: 268-278

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Julie F. Barcelona & Pieter B. Pelser, 5 February 2023

species.citation: (Blume) M.D.Turner & R.A.White , Amer. Fern J. 78 (1988) 93 ; Rufila et al., Ruhuna J. Science 13 (2022) 157; Pescuela et al., PJS 153 (2024) 664; ≡ Culcita javanica (Blume) Maxon , J. Wash. Acad. Sci. 12 (1922) 456; ≡ Dicksonia javanica Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 240. = Culcita copelandii (Christ) Maxon , J. Wash. Acad. Sci. 12 (1922) 457; ≡ Balantium copelandii (Christ) Christ , PJS 3c (1908) 301; ≡ Dicksonia copelandii Christ , PJS 2c (1907) 183.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines. LUZON: Abra, Benguet, Ilocos Norte, Kalinga, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Misamis Oriental, NEGROS.

species.citation: (Labill.) M.D.Turner & R.A.White , Amer. Fern J. 78 (1988) 92; ≡ Culcita straminea (Labill.) Maxon , J. Wash. Acad. Sci. 12 (1922) 457; ≡ Dicksonia straminea Labill. , Sert. Austro-Caledon. (1824) 7.
species.distribution: Bismarck Arch, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls. LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Julie F. Barcelona & Pieter B. Pelser, 6 August 2022

species.citation: Lehnert & Coritico , Blumea 63 (2018) 269 ; Galope-Obemio et al., J. Threatened Taxa 14 (2022) 22045; Type: F.P. Coritico FPC 016 (PNH, holo; BONN, CMUH iso), Mindanao: North Cotabato, Mt Apo, Kidapawan, Mandarangan, trail to Lake Venado, 2106m, 5-May-2012.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao del Sur, South Cotabato.

species.citation: Holttum , Kew Bull. 16 (1962) 64 ; Coritico & Amoroso, Nature Conservation Research 5 (2020) 81; Pescuela et al., PJS 153 (2024) 664; Type: Elmer 9874 (K, holo; BM, L, MICH, MO, NY, P, U, US, iso), Negros: Negros Oriental, Dumaguete, Cuernos Mts, Apr-1908. ≠ Dicksonia blumei auct. non (Kunze) T.Moore ; Copeland, LPB 2 (1908) 420.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Camarines Sur, Mountain Province, Quezon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental, Sarangani, South Cotabato, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY.
